title: Quantifying the spatial homogeneity of urban road networks via graph neural networks

meta_data.Data_Name: OpenStreetMap road network data accessed via OSMnx
meta_data.Data_summary: Street network graph data representing drivable road segments and intersections used to construct urban road networks as graphs for link prediction and spatial homogeneity estimation across grid cells within 30 cities.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We utilized OSMnx94 to download the road network data from OpenStreetMap OSM; Location: Methods Datasets; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: Global > 30 cities in the United States Europe and Asia

meta_data.Data_summary: Online map imagery used for visual validation of the node merging preprocessing step applied to the extracted road network graphs.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: We also used images from Google Maps https://www.google.com/maps to validate the node merging results; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: Global > example checks in New York and London

meta_data.Data_Name: World Population Review city population time series sourced from United Nations open datasets
meta_data.Data_summary: City population figures used to compute population growth indicators for 30 cities and relate them to the spatial homogeneity metric.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The population data we used comes from https://worldpopulationreview.com which is a visualization platform for the open datasets owned by the United Nations; Location: Data availability; Confidence: medium
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: Global > 30 cities in the United States Europe and Asia

meta_data.Data_Name: Airport flow data from 2019 Annual Airport Traffic Report Port Authority of New York and New Jersey
meta_data.Data_summary: Airport traffic flow statistics used as a socioeconomic or connectivity indicator in association analyses for a subset of cities.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The airport flow data for 21 cities are from the 2019 Annual Airport Traffic Report at https://www.panynj.gov/airports/en/statistics-general-info.html; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: Airport flow data for nine additional cities from external links in Supplementary Section 4
meta_data.Data_summary: Airport traffic flow statistics for the remaining cities not covered by the Port Authority report used as an additional city-level indicator in association analyses.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The airport flow data for the other nine cities can be accessed from links that are listed in Supplementary Section 4; Location: Data availability; Confidence: medium

meta_data.Data_summary: Authors packaged road network extracts and socioeconomic indicator data used in the study and released them together for reuse.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Both the road network data and socioeconomic data are available at the online data warehouse https://github.com/jiang719/road-network-predictability.git; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: Global > 30 cities in the United States Europe and Asia
